title: Man of Many Planes
description: A set of additional aircraft for Immersive Aircraft with Create support in mind.
body:
An addon for [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) which adds two, [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)-themed aircraft.

Models and textures by Man of Many Snails.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d10797a2d0d251767f60b25f637bc58f8e508e4b.png)
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9qdTHi0q/images/a8d155680fd5c031a76d230dea3109afb47e36b2.png)
